insights: User requested blending of the v3.2 English 7-service logic with the older v3.1 RTL Tailwind Arabic glassmorphism design. User explicitly requested embedding the live WhatsApp simulator back into the landing page instead of redirecting.
decisions: Abandoned the purely English v3.2 build. Translated the new 7 services to Arabic and created a Vercel/Linear-inspired Bento Grid.
Implemented dynamic sleek modals so service cards don't navigate away, keeping the user seamlessly engaged.
Restored the 3-layer architecture section and the 3 pricing tiers ($80/133/Custom).
issues_found: v3.2 redirection logic for services and the simulator caused friction for users wanting a complete landing page experience.
fixes_applied: Added modal JS for dynamic feature exploration

next_action.instruction: Monitor production traffic and wait for new feature requests.
